properties.name: events.listener.report-calculation.enabled
properties.description: Deprecated. Removed in favor of the master 'features.reporting.enabled' flag; the listener now activates whenever reporting is on.

deprecation.reason: The separate worker flag was vestigial — with the listener off, calculations queued but never ran, so reporting was effectively broken. Consolidated into the master reporting feature flag.

properties.name: database-change-detection.enabled
properties.description: Deprecated. Change-detection is now auto-activated when any consuming feature module (reporting, notification) is enabled.

deprecation.reason: Operators no longer need to set this flag; it is derived from features.reporting.enabled and features.notification-api.enabled.

properties.name: features.reporting.enabled
properties.description: Master feature flag for the reporting / query module.
